summary: Diff adds new realistic race scene components: a HUD overlay (lap + speed), keyboard car controls, a smoothed chase camera hook, a new textured road-course scene with asphalt/grass/curbs/guardrails, and a new sports-coupe car component that loads a livery texture and includes spoiler/glass-like materials. However, the required generated image assets themselves are not shown as added under frontend/public/assets/generated, and realism items like fog/sky tuning are only partially evidenced.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add new required static art assets (textures/decals) as generated images under frontend/public/assets/generated and reference them directly from the frontend car/track rendering.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows code that loads specific textures from /assets/generated, but no new image files are shown as added under frontend/public/assets/generated in the file diff summary.

hallucinated_features.description: HUD control hint badge ("WASD / Arrow Keys to Drive") added to the overlay.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-4 only requires lap/total laps and speed readout; the controls hint is additional UI not requested.
